symptoms.symptom_name: Acute severe fatigue / functional collapse (bedbound, unable to stay awake >2h)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Emotional and physical exhaustion is the core burnout feature, but is non-specific.
Fatigue is a leading hypothyroid symptom — keeps the organic mimic live.
Fatigue with tachycardia and pallor is compatible with anaemia.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic unrecognised occupational overload (unpaid committee/mentoring load on top of full role)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sustained, high-demand, low-reciprocity work strain is the causal exposure for burnout.
Reduced cognitive efficacy is part of the burnout syndrome.
Cognitive slowing is also a hypothyroid feature — supports organic exclusion.
Sleep disruption from hyperarousal is common in burnout/adjustment states.
Recurrent infections/viral prodrome keeps EBV and post-viral fatigue in the differential.
Chronic stress can lower resistance to infection, but this is non-specific.

symptoms.symptom_name: Anhedonia confined to work, preserved enjoyment outside work

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Global anhedonia is required for MDD; enjoyment preserved outside work argues against it and toward adjustment disorder.
Domain-specific (work) exhaustion and cynicism is characteristic of burnout rather than a global mood disorder.
Caffeine loading to force wakefulness contributes to palpitations, tachycardia and poor sleep; a modifiable exacerbator, not a diagnosis.
Compensatory tachycardia occurs in anaemia — supports organic work-up.
Autonomic arousal and caffeine explain palpitations, but do not exclude an organic cause.
Sealed clinician measurement; the AI Doctor infers a fast heartbeat only from the patient's reported palpitations, not a measured rate.
Sealed clinician measurement; low-normal BP with fatigue keeps adrenal insufficiency in the differential but is not obtainable via chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of exudative pharyngitis, cervical lymphadenopathy or significant fever on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sealed exam finding that lowers EBV likelihood — but the AI Doctor cannot perform this exam remotely, so EBV is not excludable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Screening bloods (FBC, TFTs, EBV serology, electrolytes, iron studies, glucose, cortisol)

investigation_details.expected_result: Pending — required to exclude organic mimics before confirming the psychosocial diagnosis
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Organic causes (thyroid, anaemia, EBV, adrenal, metabolic) remain unexcluded and could be missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal TFTs are needed to safely exclude hypothyroidism as the cause of the fatigue.
Normal FBC/iron studies are needed to exclude anaemia.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Exhaustion + sustained occupational overload + reduced efficacy + work-confined anhedonia together point to burnout — but only after organic exclusion.
The same fatigue-plus-mild-autonomic picture is shared by several organic conditions that require exam and bloods to exclude — the driver for in-person escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Exclude anaemia as a cause of fatigue, pallor and tachycardia.
Exclude hypothyroidism, a classic mimic of fatigue and cognitive slowing.
Exclude infectious mononucleosis / post-viral cause given recurrent viral illnesses.
Exclude metabolic derangement and adrenal insufficiency given acute collapse and low-normal BP.
Given palpitations and resting tachycardia, an ECG at the in-person visit characterises the rhythm — not obtainable via telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Extensive imaging (CT/MRI) or broad autoimmune panels at first contact
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not indicated at this stage; first-line bloods and exam come first. Over-investigating is an error of commission.
